title: German Cheese Croquette
description: A German-inspired cheese croquette recipe with a crispy exterior and a gooey cheese center.

ingredients.name: Cheese
ingredients.amount: 1 cup shredded (such as cheddar or mozzarella)

instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together the shredded cheese and chopped chives.
3. Unwrap the croquettes and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Using a spoon, divide the cheese mixture among the croquettes, spooning it into the center of each one.
5. Close the croquettes and place them on the baking sheet.
6. Sprinkle the all-purpose flour over the top of the croquettes.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the croquettes are golden brown and crispy.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
